title: Implement a pest management plan
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Implement a pest management plan demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify and allocate resources for the pest management plan

pcs.text: Determine operational parameters and objectives in consultation with management
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine operational parameters and objectives in consultation with management?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine operational parameters and objectives in consultation with management.

pcs.text: Determine site operational parameters through site inspection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine site operational parameters through site inspection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine site operational parameters through site inspection.

pcs.text: Consult stakeholders to provide advice and secure support on pest management activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult stakeholders to provide advice and secure support on pest management activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult stakeholders to provide advice and secure support on pest management activities.

pcs.text: Identify budgetary allocations and determine the effect on resources and activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify budgetary allocations and determine the effect on resources and activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify budgetary allocations and determine the effect on resources and activities.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety, environmental and biosecurity hazards and risks and determine controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety, environmental and biosecurity hazards and risks and determine controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety, environmental and biosecurity hazards and risks and determine controls.

pcs.text: Select and allocate pest management activities to personnel according to planned health and safety in the workplace standards, legislation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and allocate pest management activities to personnel according to planned health and safety in the workplace standards, legislation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and allocate pest management activities to personnel according to planned health and safety in the workplace standards, legislation.

pcs.text: Procure machinery, equipment, tools and materials identified in the plan according to health and safety in the workplace standards and legislation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Procure machinery, equipment, tools and materials identified in the plan according to health and safety in the workplace standards and legislation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Procure machinery, equipment, tools and materials identified in the plan according to health and safety in the workplace standards and legislation.

pcs.text: Inform personnel of the requirements and expectations of the pest management plan according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Advise personnel of health and safety in the workplace standards and legislative and regulatory requirements to be applied when carrying out required activities.

elements.title: Implement the pest management plan

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure machinery, equipment, tools and materials are checked and serviceable.

pcs.text: Ensure personal protective equipment is serviceable, fitted and used by personnel according to health and safety in the workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure personal protective equipment is serviceable, fitted and used by personnel according to health and safety in the workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Manage pest control techniques according to pest management plan.
